description: Conduct a comparative design study between Clark-Y and NACA 4412 airfoils for a small wind turbine using the airfoil files located in /home/ga/Documents/airfoils_task/. Generate polars for both airfoils at Re=300,000 (Ncrit=9) with 360-degree extrapolation. Design two 3-bladed rotors (Radius=1.5m, Hub=0.1m) optimized for TSR=6 using the Schmitz method, one for each airfoil. Perform a BEM simulation for both rotors at 8 m/s wind speed over a TSR range of 3 to 10. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/airfoil_comparison.wpa and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/airfoil_selection_report.txt documenting the maximum Cp for each and identifying the superior airfoil.
